title: AI Content Assistant SaaS
description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform with LLM-powered content generation, user workspaces, and subscription billing.
highlights: Next.js frontend with server and client components
OpenAI API integration for content workflows
Node.js API with role-based access control
Stripe subscription and usage metering

title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
description: Live monitoring platform with WebSocket feeds, interactive charts, and alert management for operations teams.
highlights: React dashboard with real-time data visualization
WebSocket and Kafka event streaming pipeline
Sub-second update latency for critical metrics
Role-based dashboards for multi-team access

title: Cloud Event Processing Backend
description: Serverless event-driven backend on AWS handling high-volume message processing and async job orchestration.
highlights: AWS Lambda, SQS, and SNS event architecture
Dockerized microservices with auto-scaling
GitHub Actions CI/CD with automated testing
99.9% uptime SLA for production workloads

title: Enterprise Admin Dashboard
description: Full stack admin portal for managing users, permissions, reporting, and system configuration at scale.
highlights: Vue.js and React component library integration
Laravel and Node.js REST API backends
PostgreSQL with optimized query patterns
Responsive design with accessibility compliance

title: Workflow Automation Platform
description: Internal automation tool connecting APIs, scheduled jobs, and AI agents for business process automation.
highlights: Visual workflow builder with trigger/action nodes
LLM integration for document processing tasks
Python FastAPI services for job execution
Webhook and third-party API connectors
